articles.title: KSEB’s new proposal may change your power bill: Cheaper daytime electricity, costly nights ahead
articles.description: KSEB explores new electricity tariff plans: premium night rates and increased daytime concessions. Read how these changes affect consumers and solar producers.

articles.title: Google’s AI Search may be overthinking things, just ask ‘disregard’
articles.description: Google’s redesigned AI-powered Search is facing criticism after users noticed bizarre results for the word “disregard”. Instead of quickly showing dictionary links, the new interface fills the screen with an unnecessary AI-generated response. The moment has sparked fresh debate over whether AI is making Search smarter or simply more complicated.

articles.title: CMF Watch 3 Pro Review: The Budget Smartwatch That Means Business
articles.description: The CMF Watch 3 Pro has a 1.43-inch AMOLED display, dual-band GPS, ChatGPT integration and up to 13 days of battery into a metal-bodied smartwatch priced at Rs 7,999. Here's whether it lives up to the hype.

articles.title: Uber weighs higher bid for Delivery Hero: FT
articles.description: Uber's board met to discuss increasing its offer for Delivery Hero after a major shareholder rejected a bid valuing the German firm at over 11.5 billion euros. Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi previously offered 33 euros per share, but a larger shareholder was rebuffed with a 38 euros per share proposal.

articles.title: Google Keeps Pushing AI Into Search, Here’s How Users Are Fighting Back
articles.description: Google has been evolving its Search platform, moving away from traditional blue links to a more AI-driven experience.

articles.title: Hindalco sees 5% rise in raw material costs, stays confident on key customers
articles.description: Hindalco anticipates a 5% rise in raw material costs. The company is confident in keeping clients like Ford Motor Company. Subsidiary Novelis expects 2027 to be a key year for growth in aluminium can sheet production. Despite disruptions at Novelis' Oswego plant, Hindalco's India business achieved record profits.

articles.title: High risk, high reward S Korea to debut AI-boom linked ETFs
articles.description: South Korea is launching its first single-stock leveraged ETFs, linked to chipmakers Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, aiming to double daily stock movements. These products are expected to attract significant retail investor interest, potentially amplifying the market's already high volatility and concentration risk.

articles.title: Bellatrix readying ultra-low orbit satellites
articles.description: The Bengaluru-based company is targeting launches in 2027 or 2028 and is positioning the project as a potential breakthrough in very low Earth orbit (VLEO) satellite operations, an area that remains largely unexplored globally because of the extreme atmospheric drag at those altitudes.

articles.title: Post-Iran war panic? US fast-tracks Patriot overhaul amid shortages, 'failures' in Mid-East
articles.description: The U.S. Army has awarded Lockheed Martin a $61 million contract for two important Patriot air defense upgrades, moves designed to address one of the system’s best-known operational weaknesses. Reporting says the package includes a new containerized launcher and the RIG-360 guidance system, which together are meant to give PAC-3 interceptors a true 360-degree engagement capability instead of the current limited sector coverage.

articles.title: Save $300 on Apple's M5 Pro MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM today only
articles.description: Save $300 on Apple's latest 14-inch MacBook Pro with an upgrade to the M5 Pro 18C CPU/20C GPU chip and boost to 48GB RAM. The flash deal ends today. Save $300 on a 14-inch MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM - Image credit: Apple Apple's M5 Pro 14-inch MacBook Pro was released in March 2026, but a popular configuration is already marked down heavily during B&H's flash sale that ends today. Save $300 on this M5 Pro model that has an 18-core CPU with a 20-core GPU, an upgrade from the standard 15-core CPU and 16-core GPU. It also has 48GB of RAM, double that of the standard 24GB found in the entry model. Rounding out the key specs is a 1TB SSD. This innovative surveillance network empowers security officials to swiftly identify and monitor any suspicious activities, resulting in a safer environment for travelers.

articles.title: Chinese astronaut to spend a full year in orbit as Beijing ramps up Moon race
articles.description: China is launching a three-man space flight to its Tiangong space station Sunday, where one astronaut will remain in orbit for a full year to prepare for future flights to the Moon. Beijing has said it aims to send a crewed mission to the Moon by 2030, having poured billions into its space programme over the past three decades.

articles.title: CBSE warns students against fake circular on revaluation, photocopy process
articles.description: CBSE has dismissed a viral circular claiming that the 2026 photocopy and revaluation process has been cancelled due to technical issues. The Board called the notice fake and urged students and parents not to trust rumours circulating on social media. CBSE advised everyone to verify examination-related information only through its official website and authorised platforms.
